items.summary: Upgrade the backend `proxyUrl` function to fully proxy arbitrary HTTP/HTTPS URLs via ICP HTTP outcalls: fetch the target URL, return the full response body (HTML, CSS, JS, images as base64), status code, and content-type header so the frontend can render actual remote web content.

Update `useProxyRequest` in `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` to pass the full response body and content-type returned by the upgraded backend actor to the caller, supporting HTML, CSS, JS, and image content types.

Update `frontend/src/components/ProxyContent.tsx` to render the full proxied HTML response in the iframe using a `srcdoc` attribute (or a Blob URL) instead of a plain `src`, so actual remote page content is displayed. Rewrite relative URLs in the proxied HTML (links, images, scripts, stylesheets) to route back through the proxy via the `onNavigate` callback, preserving navigation within the proxy.

Update `frontend/src/components/BrowserLayout.tsx` to handle loading states and errors during proxy requests, showing a spinner in the tab bar while the proxy fetch is in progress and an inline error message in the content area if the proxy request fails.
